title: AI Tools Deep Dive
summary: An advanced session covering cutting-edge AI tools and workflows. Covered Claude, Manus, and emerging tools with live demonstrations and real-world use cases from shluchim.
takeaways: Multiple AI tools exist beyond ChatGPT — Claude excels at coding and reasoning
Manus can autonomously create presentations and research
Free tiers and nonprofit credits make most tools accessible
Always verify AI outputs before using in production

title: AI Basics for Shluchim
summary: A beginner-friendly introduction to AI concepts and terminology. What is AI, what are language models, and how to get started with ChatGPT and Claude for everyday shlichus tasks.
takeaways: AI is a tool that amplifies your work — not a replacement
Start with simple tasks like drafting emails, then build up
Claude and ChatGPT are the two leading options
Prompt clearly and specifically for best results

title: Nanoclaw: Secure AI Agents
summary: Deep dive into Nanoclaw's sandboxed AI agent architecture. Why traditional agents like Claudebot pose security risks, how Docker-based isolation solves them, and a live demo of a personal AI assistant managing calendars, emails, and group summaries.
takeaways: Monolithic agents risk prompt injection and data leaks between tasks
Nanoclaw isolates each chat in its own Docker container
8,000 lines of auditable code vs 30,000+ for alternatives
Docker partnership validates the sandboxing approach
Each WhatsApp/Telegram/Slack channel gets its own isolated agent
